original_snippet_context: Discussing the initiation of debates regarding the Caixa de Conversão.
relevant_quote: "quo de conversão só.tom o noiiic-' o "quo pretendendo lixar o valor do ouro nada lixa'1
justification: This quote expresses skepticism towards the proposed Caixa de Conversão, suggesting it only has the 'name' of conversion and doesn't truly fix the value of gold, implying a potential for devaluation which is a key concern of the orthodox perspective.
